title: Preserve Our Wild Endangered Resources Party
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''POWER Party''', short for '''Preserve Our Wild Endangered Resources Party''', was a political organization on the planet [[Telos IV]]. Created in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], it was founded, led, and consisted solely of [[Thani]] resident, [[Andra (Telos IV)|Andra]]. It opposed the Telosian government's plan to give the [[UniFy]] Corporation control over Telos's National parks and Sacred places, for which the organization was outlawed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Day of Reckoning]]'' {{1st}}
